info.name: Driver Network — UC1-A Bus Driver (BMTC Full Lifecycle)
info.description:
## Driver Network — UC1-A: Bus Driver Application (BMTC, Full Lifecycle)

**Scenario:** A driver (via Aggregator Platform) discovers and applies for a full-time Bus Driver vacancy published by BMTC on the Driver Network. The application goes through telephonic interview → driving evaluation → formal offer → acceptance → employee ID issued.

**Protocol:** Beckn v2.0.0 + DriverJobResource/DriverCandidateProfileResource v2.1
**BAP:** Driver / Aggregator Platform  |  **BPP:** Operator Platform (BMTC)
**Category:** driver-job  |  **Role:** BUS_DRIVER  |  **Employment:** FULL_TIME

### Quick-start: environment setup
1. Import **DriverNetwork_Dev_Environment.json** into Postman (Environments → Import).
2. Select the **Driver Network Dev** environment.
3. Set `base_url`, `bap_url`, and `auth_token` to your sandbox endpoints.
4. `network_id` is currently a placeholder — confirm with network registry team.

### Hiring stage progression
APPLICATION_SUBMITTED → INTERVIEW_SCHEDULED → EVALUATION_COMPLETE → OFFER_ISSUED → OFFER_ACCEPTED → HIRING_CONFIRMED → ONBOARDING_COMPLETE

### Key output
`employeeId` issued at on_confirm (folder 14). `applicationId` set at init (folder 05).

### Structural conventions (Beckn v2.0.0)
- `select` carries a DRAFT `Contract` (`message.contract` per core spec)
- BAP originates contract (no id); BPP assigns `contract_id` at on_select
- `schemaContext` only on discover / on_discover; absent from all negotiation messages
- `commitment.offer.resourceIds` required in all BAP messages and on_status
- `passport_reference` (PII) present only from init onward — absent at select
- No monetary Consideration/Settlement — salary terms in `offer.offerAttributes`

variable.description: Confirm exact value with network registry team
UUID format required by core spec
PII — Driver Passport reference. Disclosed at init and later only.

item.name: 01 — discover
item.description: BAP broadcasts job search to gateway.

item.name: 05 — init
item.description: BAP sends full participant + passport ref (PII gate: init).

item.name: 06 — on_init
item.description: BPP confirms application submitted, perf stage = APPLICATION_SUBMITTED.

item.name: 07 — update  ★ INTERVIEW_SCHEDULED
item.description: BPP pushes interview schedule; BAP acknowledges.

item.name: 13 — confirm
item.description: BAP accepts offer; contract moves ACTIVE.
